description: Service identity migration — auth provisioning, CI/CD cutover, observability, and decommission

checkpoints.title: Identity provider app registrations created for all components
checkpoints.description: All service components requiring authentication must have app registrations or service principals provisioned in the identity provider before cutover.
checkpoints.fix_hint: Create app registrations for each component in your identity provider. Attest completion in .readiness/external-evidence.json with a link to the registration(s).

checkpoints.title: API permissions granted with admin or owner consent
checkpoints.description: All required API permissions for the new app registrations must be granted and consented to by an admin or owner before the service can authenticate.
checkpoints.fix_hint: Grant and consent to all required API permissions. Attest completion in .readiness/external-evidence.json with a link to the permission grant record.

checkpoints.title: Security groups or RBAC roles created for access tiers
checkpoints.description: Security groups or RBAC roles must be created and populated for each access tier (read, write, admin) before user access can be migrated.
checkpoints.fix_hint: Create security groups or RBAC roles for each access tier and populate membership. Attest in .readiness/external-evidence.json.

checkpoints.title: CI/CD service connections validated for target environments
checkpoints.description: Pipeline service connections to target environments must exist and be validated before deploying. Missing connections cause silent deployment failures.
checkpoints.fix_hint: Ensure a pipeline definition exists and service connections to all target environments have been tested. Attest validation in .readiness/external-evidence.json.

checkpoints.title: Application deployed to all target environments
checkpoints.description: The application must be successfully deployed to all target environments (staging, production) and validated before traffic cutover.
checkpoints.fix_hint: Deploy to all target environments and verify health. Attest in .readiness/external-evidence.json with links to deployment records.

checkpoints.title: Observability baseline established in new environment
checkpoints.description: Logging and monitoring must be wired and emitting data in the new environment before cutover to ensure visibility during and after migration.
checkpoints.fix_hint: Verify logging and monitoring are wired and emitting data in the new environment. Attest in .readiness/external-evidence.json with a link to the dashboard or log view.

checkpoints.title: Compliance reviews initiated for security, privacy, and responsible AI
checkpoints.description: Security, privacy, and responsible AI review processes must be initiated for the new service identity before production cutover.
checkpoints.fix_hint: Submit the service for security review, privacy review, and responsible AI review. Attest with ticket or review links in .readiness/external-evidence.json.

checkpoints.title: Functional validation and sign-off completed
checkpoints.description: End-to-end functional validation must be completed in the target environment and signed off by the team before traffic is cut over.
checkpoints.fix_hint: Run end-to-end tests in the target environment and get sign-off from the team. Attest in .readiness/external-evidence.json with a link to test results.

checkpoints.title: Decommission plan documented for previous service identity
checkpoints.description: A decommission plan must exist describing how the previous service identity, app registrations, and access will be removed after successful cutover.
checkpoints.fix_hint: Create a decommission plan document (e.g., docs/decommission-plan.md) describing how to remove the previous service identity, app registrations, and access grants after cutover.
